name: blockchain-query
description: Free blockchain data access across 60+ networks. Live lookups for balances, transactions, blocks, tokens, staking, governance, and domain resolution — powered by Pocket Network's decentralized RPC infrastructure. No API key required.
long_description:
BlockchainQuery gives Claude real-time access to blockchain data across 60+ networks through Pocket Network's decentralized RPC gateway. Query balances, transactions, blocks, smart contracts, token metadata, staking positions, governance proposals, and domain resolution — all without API keys or authentication.

Supported protocols: EVM (Ethereum, Arbitrum, Base, Polygon, Optimism, and 35+ more), Solana, Cosmos (Osmosis, Pocket, Akash, and 10+ more), Sui, Near, and Tron.

Provided as a free public good by the Pocket Network Foundation.

tools.name: list_chains
tools.description: List supported blockchain networks, with optional protocol or network filter

tools.name: get_chain_info
tools.description: Get RPC URL, protocol type, supported methods, and status for a specific chain

tools.name: evm_call
tools.description: Execute a JSON-RPC call on any EVM-compatible blockchain

tools.name: evm_get_balance
tools.description: Get native token balance for an address on any EVM chain

tools.name: evm_get_block
tools.description: Get block details by number or hash from any EVM chain

tools.name: evm_get_transaction
tools.description: Get transaction details by hash from any EVM chain

tools.name: evm_get_receipt
tools.description: Get transaction receipt including logs, status, and gas used

tools.name: evm_get_logs
tools.description: Search event logs on any EVM chain with block range safety limits

tools.name: evm_estimate_gas
tools.description: Estimate gas cost for a transaction on any EVM chain

tools.name: evm_get_token_info
tools.description: Get ERC-20 token balance, name, symbol, decimals, and total supply

tools.name: evm_call_contract
tools.description: Execute a read-only smart contract function call

tools.name: solana_get_balance
tools.description: Get SOL or SPL token balance for a Solana address

tools.name: solana_get_account
tools.description: Get Solana account information including owner, lamports, and data

tools.name: solana_get_block
tools.description: Get Solana block details by slot number

tools.name: solana_get_transaction
tools.description: Get Solana transaction details by signature

tools.name: solana_get_signatures
tools.description: Get recent transaction signatures for a Solana address

tools.name: cosmos_get_balance
tools.description: Get native or all token balances on any Cosmos SDK chain

tools.name: cosmos_get_staking
tools.description: Get staking delegations and rewards on any Cosmos chain

tools.name: cosmos_get_validators
tools.description: Get validator list or details on any Cosmos chain

tools.name: cosmos_get_transaction
tools.description: Get or search transactions on any Cosmos chain

tools.name: cosmos_get_governance
tools.description: Get governance proposals and votes on any Cosmos chain

tools.name: cosmos_get_block
tools.description: Get block by height or latest on any Cosmos chain

tools.name: sui_get_balance
tools.description: Get SUI or token balance for a Sui address

tools.name: sui_get_object
tools.description: Get Sui object details by ID or list owned objects

tools.name: sui_get_transaction
tools.description: Get Sui transaction details by digest

tools.name: sui_get_coins
tools.description: Get coin details with pagination for a Sui address

tools.name: near_query
tools.description: Query Near Protocol: account info, view function calls, access keys, or contract state

tools.name: near_get_block
tools.description: Get Near block by height, hash, or latest

tools.name: near_get_transaction
tools.description: Get Near transaction status and receipts by hash

tools.name: resolve_domain
tools.description: Resolve ENS (.eth) or Unstoppable Domains (.crypto, .nft, etc.) to a blockchain address

tools.name: compare_balances
tools.description: Compare native token balances for an address across multiple chains (max 5)

tools.name: convert_units
tools.description: Convert between blockchain denomination units (wei/ETH, lamports/SOL, MIST/SUI, yoctoNEAR/NEAR, SUN/TRX)
